MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwen Washington.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Andrea Smith is present.
Attorney Elliott Seals representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of July-30-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
